title: Windsurf Cheat Sheet
description: A practical guide for engineers using Windsurf, covering API parameters, CLI flags, and prompt techniques.

commands.description: Sets the randomness of the AI's responses.
commands.scenario: When building a code review bot that needs deterministic output.

commands.description: Enables streaming mode with the GPT-4o model.
commands.scenario: For real-time code suggestions during live coding sessions.

commands.command: Think step by step. Then verify your answer.
commands.description: Encourages the model to reason through problems methodically.
commands.scenario: When debugging complex algorithms and needing thorough explanations.

commands.description: Limits the response length to control verbosity.
commands.scenario: When generating concise code snippets or explanations.

commands.description: Sets a timeout for API requests to prevent long waits.
commands.scenario: When integrating into systems with strict response time requirements.

commands.command: Use comments to clarify each step.
commands.description: Instructs the model to add comments for better code understanding.
commands.scenario: When generating educational content or tutorials.

commands.description: Enables detailed logging for debugging purposes.
commands.scenario: When troubleshooting integration issues with the API.

commands.description: Selects a specific model version for compatibility.
commands.scenario: When needing a balance of cost and performance for code generation.

commands.command: Provide examples of desired output format.
commands.description: Guides the model to produce output in a specific format.
commands.scenario: When generating code snippets that must adhere to a style guide.

commands.description: Retries the request up to three times on failure.
commands.scenario: When ensuring reliability in network communication with the API.

commands.description: Increases creativity by allowing more randomness.
commands.scenario: When exploring multiple creative solutions to a problem.

commands.command: Summarize the key points before concluding.
commands.description: Instructs the model to provide a summary at the end of its response.
commands.scenario: When generating reports or documentation that require a summary.

commands.description: Enables caching of responses to improve speed and reduce costs.
commands.scenario: For repeated queries where responses do not change often.

commands.command: Act as a Senior Software Architect and review this code for scalability and design patterns.
commands.description: Role-based prompting to force the agent into a higher-level architectural reasoning mode rather than just syntax correction.
A theoretical flag to manage memory usage and prevent context overflow in long-running sessions.

commands.command: Compare the current implementation against [specific library/standard] and identify deviations.
commands.description: Constraint-based prompting to ensure compliance with specific industry standards or documentation.

commands.command: Generate unit tests using the Arrange-Act-Assert (AAA) pattern for the following function.
commands.description: Structural prompting to enforce specific testing methodologies and improve code reliability.

commands.command: Refactor this code to reduce cyclomatic complexity.
commands.description: Metric-driven optimization command to improve maintainability and code readability.
